Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm fine helping out with studying, but... wouldn't it be easier to focus without the distraction?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}They say studying with others grants benefits that can't be found alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hey, so, if we flunk the exams... are we really gonna have to stay behind!? Tell me that's a joke![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's no joke. As students, studying is our top priority. Failure will result in consequences.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Well, I'm not too worried about that. Not naming names here, but don't get in the way, Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}What happened to not naming names!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Ugh... I guess if the fate of my trip depends on it, I don't really have a choice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}I'll show you. I'll prove just how serious I am about Yakushima![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My hand stops as I hit a tough question...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What's the matter, {f 4 1}? Something you need help with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Ah, "scintillating"... It can refer to either a literal sparkle, or a metaphorical brilliance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Learn your vocab, or instead of going to Yakushima, you're going to Yaku-see-me back at the dorm![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Yakushima, Yaku-see-me... Hmm, maybe that one's a little forced...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}An arithmetic sequence, huh? Do you remember the formula for calculating its sum? See, if you do this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}A beautiful formula really arithmetickles my fancy! Haha, yeah, that one's pretty good. Let me write that down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Old English verb conjugation differs from modern day. For example, "you are" becomes "thou art"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Oh my! Remembering how to use archaic forms of verbs sounds rather in-tense![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Hmm... In-tense! I like the sound of that one. Keeping a note of that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Wisecracks from Junpei are one thing, but I didn't account for this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Maybe he's trying to... test our ability to concentrate? Yeah, I suppose that's not likely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hmm, Ikutsuki-san's one-upping me. I've gotta think of a killer comeback...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Stop getting distracted. You need to concentrate on your studies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}She's right. Gotta focus... Let's keep at it, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I focused so hard, I couldn't[n]hear anything else...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Are you struggling with memorization, {f 4 1}? Nothing beats repeating it until you know it by heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Beats... Heart? Bwahaha! Not bad, Kirijo-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Wha—!? No, that— That was not my intent with that statement...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Well, if you're pullin' out of the race, then I win hands down! Kirijo-senpai de-feet-ed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Ugh... This is giving me a headache.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Despite the diversions, I'd say that was productive. Keep it up so we can all go to Yakushima together.[n]{f 1 1}
